description: Apply the inverse of a commit to the working tree without creating a new commit
intents: undo a commit but let me review before committing the revert
apply the revert changes without making a new commit yet
revert several commits and bundle them into one commit
stage the inverse of a commit so i can edit it first
do a revert but hold off on the commit
combine multiple reverts into one commit
preview what a revert would do before locking it in
